calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Howard Olsen, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Dan Dilger, dba the American Lease Exchange, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Selective Motors, LLC.
Default was entered against defendant Selective Motors, LLC on July 12, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Victor Guerra was filed on September 30, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Dan Dilger, dba the American Lease Exchange, and against Defaulted Defendant Selective Motors, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $9,085.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,250.00.
Costs - $320.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $10,705.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2010 Continued To Nov-24-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-22-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
